title: Deploy Rollback Procedure
summary: When a canary deploy exceeds error budget, auto-rollback via CI pipeline

title: Horizontal Pod Autoscaler Tuning
summary: Scale replicas when CPU > 80% for 5min, cooldown 3min between scale-ups

title: Slow Query Detection & Remediation
summary: Identify queries with seq_scan or missing index via pg_stat_activity

title: Circuit Breaker Recovery
summary: After 3 consecutive timeouts, open circuit; retry after 30s half-open window

title: Schema Migration Validation
summary: Run data integrity checks after each migration: row count, checksum, FK validation
